NAVAREA XIX 4/18

1.RIGLIST CORRECT AT 180630 UTC JAN 18.


NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

72-12.7N - 019-46,5E LEIV EIRIKSSON
67-04.4N - 007-00.6E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN
65-21.6N - 007-20.1E SONGA ENCOURAGE
65-13.8N - 006-25.6E DEEPSEA BERGEN

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METER SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 02/18
